word: G615 - ἀποκτείνω - apokteínō - ap-ok-ti'-no - Put to death

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀποκτείνω

- Transliteration: Apokteino

- Phonetic: ap-ok-ti'-no

- Definition:

1. to kill in any way whatever

a. to destroy, to allow to perish

2. metaph. to extinguish, abolish

a. to inflict mortal death

b. to deprive of spiritual life and procure eternal misery in hell

- Origin: from G575 and kteino (to slay)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G575 and κτείνω kteinō (to slay); to kill outright; figuratively to destroy: - put to death kill slay.
